description: Introducing this thoughtfully appointed, corner townhouse on the quiet side of Founders Block, a LEED Gold–certified community by Anthem. Beautifully positioned w/ an entrance on the charming laneway, away from 3rd St. This scandi-inspired home is drenched in light from N, S & W facing windows. Engineered hardwood, in-floor heat, HRV, sleek kitchen w/gas range and stone countertops make this open-concept home sing. Share gorgeous city & water views from the top floor with friends or enjoy your patio in the lush courtyard while barbequing dinner. Direct access to 2 parking (1 EV) and 2 oversized storage lockers provides endless convenience. Steps to Moodyville Park, a short stroll via the Spirit Trail to Lonsdale, The Quay, and the SeaBus—urban convenience in a peaceful, connected setting.
